meta.title: Blue Ribbon Study Panel on Biodefense
meta.description:
Panel One:  Biological Arms Control, Cooperative Threat Reduction, Global Health Security Agenda, and Quarantine
Speakers: Dr. David R. Franz (via internet video) Dr. Dan Gerstein,  Dr. Beth Cameron, Dr. Mike Stoto 

Working Lunch: First Responder Protection
Speaker:  Dr. William Raub

Panel Two:  Biosecurity, the Select Agent Program, and Synthetic Biology
Speakers: Dr. Timothy Lu, Dr. Tom Ksiazek 
 
Panel Three:  Resilience, Biodeterrence, First Responder Vaccination, and Agricultural Defense
Speaker:  Dr. Jeff Levi, Mr. Bruce Miller, Mr. Mark Landahl, Dr. Curt Mann 

Panel Four:  Insights on Ebola and Pandemic Influenza Response
Speakers: Dr. Robin Robinson, Dr. Monique Mansoura, Dr. Daniel Lucey

For more information on this Blue Ribbon Study Panel on Biodefense, please visit http://www.biodefensestudy.org/
